title: TokenGroupResponse
description: A token group representing equivalent currencies across different blockchains

slug.description: Unique slug identifier for the token group

display_name.description: Display name of the token group

symbol.description: Ticker symbol of the token group

image_url.description: URL of the token group's image

opensea_url.description: URL to the token group page on OpenSea

primary_currency.description: The primary currency for this token group

stats.description: Market statistics for the token group

socials.description: Social media links for the token group

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the token group was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the token group was last updated
